'''Lai Nootka''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Arms dealer/Legends|arms dealer]] and trader.

Nootka was known to use aliases for himself and his [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], ''[[Star's Delight]]'', created by mixing the names of characters from famous Durosian children's novels.

Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Nootka was captured on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]] by [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Mosh Barris/Legends|Mosh Barris]] for attempting to sell [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] spare parts and [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. After being [[Great Evacuation|rescued]] by [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and [[Dynba Tesc]], Nootka shifted his base of operations to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], Nootka met with [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] member [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] at [[The Headquarters]], a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on Coruscant, to discuss the sale of parts for [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]]. Horn, who witnessed the exchange, mistook the tall, cloaked Duros for [[Kirtan Loor]].

Nootka was later [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agents so that he would be unable to testify at the [[Trial of Tycho Celchu|trial]] of Celchu for supposedly killing Horn.<ref name="Star Wars Encyclopedia">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
